dates.summary: ByteDance Seed launched Seed 2.0 alongside its Seed Full-Duplex Speech LLM and the Dola-Seed-2.0-Preview on Arena, signaling a serious push into real-time voice interaction and broader foundation-model deployment. Zhipu AI unveiled GLM-5 as its new flagship agent-engineering model, claiming open-source state-of-the-art coding and agent performance with results comparable to Claude Opus 4.5 on SWE-bench Verified and Terminal Bench 2.0. On the research side, "Judge Circuits" highlighted a core reliability issue in LLM-as-a-judge evaluation by showing score shifts caused purely by output-format changes, a meaningful warning for teams relying on automated benchmarking.
